title: Obey the Rules: Forest
description:
— I’ve found myself lost on an endless, straight road.

Apparently, there are rules governing this road.

They say that if I can follow the rules, I’ll be able to escape.

But the rules are obscured by static and impossible to read.

What are the correct rules?

What can I do right now?

Can you escape this endless, straight road?

[Features]• A walking simulator where you walk along an endless straight path

• Observation and deduction gameplay that requires you to determine the correct actions using subtle clues, such as changes in the environment and sound.

• Escape from a seemingly endless path through trial and error.

【Play Time】20–40 minutes

【Live Streaming and Broadcasting】The following guidelines apply to live streaming, broadcasting, and video posting of this game.

Individuals and organizations may publicly share gameplay videos and live streams of this game online.

Monetization of videos (ad revenue, donations, etc.) is permitted.

Streaming or broadcasting content that violates public order and morality, or contains discriminatory or extreme expressions, is prohibited. 

The developer shall not be held liable for any damages (data loss, equipment issues, revenue reduction, disputes, etc.) arising from the streaming, posting, or viewing of this game. 

※This guideline may be revised without prior notice. Please always refer to the latest version.
description_short: An endless path lies ahead. Break the rules, and it will never end. Observe, deduce, and make the right choices to find your way out.
